home.title: Warren de Leon
home.subtitle: Software Engineering Manager
home.aboutText: Hi, I'm Warren de Leon — an Engineering Manager passionate about building high-performing teams and fostering environments where engineers can thrive. After over a decade in hands-on development, I've embarked on a new chapter: leading with purpose. While I no longer write code daily, I now focus on the human side of engineering — providing constructive feedback, navigating challenging conversations, and cultivating a culture of ownership, quality, and collaboration. I'm continuously learning what it means to be an effective manager, approaching this journey with the same curiosity and drive that fuelled my years as a software engineer.

bookACall.title: Book a Call
bookACall.description: Schedule a 60-minute video call with me.
